log.why: Spell ids are runtime file identity, derived from file names rather than canonical spell prose.

fields.comment: Spell ids are runtime file identity, derived from file names rather than canonical spell prose. It maps to `id`. Purpose: id exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about this mechanic. It is runtime metadata derived from file organization or local engine needs rather than a direct canonical prose mechanic. It maps to runtime JSON path `id`. The value type is `string`. This is expected on every spell/template instance. Because this field is required, every spell should carry a deliberate value rather than relying on absence.

Mapped from structured Level. It maps to `level`. It is populated from the structured markdown label `Level`.
